_comment: Resume variant registry. Maps job-title lanes to a pre-authored, ATS-passing resume file. The router (src/job_hunt/resume_registry.py) scores each variant against a scored lead using title-pattern match + emphasis-skills overlap + seniority band, then picks the best. default_variant is used when no specialized lane clears the minimum confidence. To add a variant: drop an ATS-passing markdown resume under profile/resumes/, then add an entry pointing resume_path at it. A variant whose resume_path is missing still routes but is flagged needs_human_review. JSON (not YAML) because the repo is stdlib-only except Pillow and the in-repo YAML loader does not support nested list-of-objects. This file is config, not code: routing reads it, never rewrites it.

variants.label: Applied AI / Agentic Engineer
variants.notes: Applied-AI / agentic-engineering lane (NOT ML research). Resume authored locally (gitignored) from the 3 approved ai_engineer-allowed claims only (Amazon Q Business assistant, ai-company-os agentic control plane with dated snapshot, Better Business Web as a product/project). Deliberately omits ML-research signals (pytorch/rag/ml/nlp) and research-only titles (machine learning / applied scientist / nlp) so deep-ML roles do not misroute here; the lane targets applied-AI/tooling software roles. Thinnest backing of the ready lanes (3 claims) - keep claims-bank-safe. Like the other lanes the file is private/gitignored (profile-doctor reports ready_local as info, never error).

variants.label: Platform / Backend Engineer
variants.notes: Resume authored locally (gitignored), hardened with user-reviewed answers (2026-06-19): real employer/titles/dates/education, platform-level revenue wording, qualitative perf, validated-integrity migration wording, dated ai-company-os snapshot, Better Business Web as product/project. Marker-free, ATS-clean. Resume file stays private/gitignored.

variants.label: Full-Stack / Product Engineer
variants.notes: Use for product-facing / full-stack roles. Resume authored locally (gitignored), product/full-stack positioning drawn only from approved fullstack_product claims (real employer/titles/dates/education; platform-level revenue wording; Better Business Web framed as a product/project only, no paid-client/agency work; one-of-four-engineers framing on the monolith migration). Like platform_backend/generalist_swe, the file is private/gitignored, so a clean checkout will not have it (profile-doctor reports ready_local as info, never error).

variants.label: Generalist Software Engineer
variants.notes: Catch-all default (empty title_patterns = wildcard) AND a ready lane. Resume authored locally (gitignored), broad full-stack-leaning SWE positioning drawn only from approved generalist_swe claims (real employer/titles/dates/education; platform-level revenue wording; no agency/paid-client, no K8s, no unverified percentages). Like platform_backend, the file is private/gitignored, so a clean checkout will not have it (profile-doctor reports ready_local as info, never error).
